target: 47. Hishigata Clinic Old Clinic
July 23
Shinpei Ajiro
(We went home once to prepare, and agreed to meet at the entrance of Mt. Takanosu.)
(I brought the nail gun Nezu-san left for me, but...)
(Even though I practiced a little since then, it's far from enough... Can I really handle it properly in actual combat?)
Kept you waiting!!
How is it? Amazing equipment, right!! I was a catcher in the baseball club until last year...!! I brought the gear I used back then!
And a metal bat! Simple is the strongest! Both defense and attack power are flawless~~~~...!
Huh?
People often tell me I'm bad at reacting to jokes, but... Am I supposed to point out how ridiculous that outfit is?
I am completely serious!!!!
Are you sure you're okay with that equipment!? Don't tell me you came empty-handed!!
No problem!
He's got me!
Whoa!! That necklace...! You... you've got Ushio equipped!?
Yeah, with this I don't need to worry. Let's go to the old clinic!
...Sou. Why were you trying to investigate the old clinic in the first place?
Hm? Ah...
See... I tried to sneak in just once during summer vacation in fourth grade.
Huh!?
I was invited by Totsumura and his friends, they said we were doing a test of courage...
Wow, the worst... He's supposed to be a cop, right!? Can't he read the "No Trespassing" sign!
You're one to talk!
But in the end, we didn't get inside. My dad found us...
(So that happened...)
I didn't really pay it much mind at the time... This area is our land, so I figured my dad might be around sometimes.
But thinking about it, it's weird. What business did my dad have alone in these ruins?
...I see. So you thought he was hiding something.
If you're hiding something in ruins, what could it be...
Ushio, are there Shadows nearby?
Hmmmmmm...
(Ushio, having regained her memories, is supposedly able to sense the "presence" of Shadows.)
(It wouldn't be strange if one was further inside... How is it?)
...Hmm~! It's fine for now!!!
S-Suddenly in human form...!
Hey, wait a sec! You guys~~! Are you screwing around wearing a swimsuit!?
We might have to fight Shadows from here on out, you know!!? We didn't come here to swim~~!
Huh? Did you come here to play baseball? Haaaaah!?
The swimsuit is my battle uniform!! Don't mess with me, you hear!!!!
Eek!!
Scary...!! She's scary!! Completely different from Mio! How did you live with someone like that, Shinpei!
Shut up! Shinpei, just explain it to him already!
A-Ah. Umm, as a result of trying various things...
We figured out that wearing real clothes or items gets in the way when transforming.
Even if I wear armor, my main body is a 2D shadow... If my shadow gets stabbed, I die.
So, if I'm fighting using my repertoire, a swimsuit is the best!
By the way, I can transform into anything I've copied once as many times as I want. As long as my brain capacity allows, I can increase my repertoire.
Amazing, right!?
Yeah... But I don't know where to look!!
Hey!
Huh?
Ugh... It's got way too much atmosphere... It's not going to collapse on us, right?
It was declared off-limits 14 years ago due to the building's deterioration, after all. It's not impossible.
Wait!?
It should be fine just walking around inside, but don't stomp around too much, okay?
(There's a lot of old furniture and books... It's hard to even tell how old they are.)
Amazing... Is it really preserved exactly as it was back then? It looks like it has historical value.
Yeah...
Apparently it didn't burn down during the Wakayama air raid either, so it's stood just as it was built in the Meiji era, making it over 100 years old...
I heard it became abandoned around 1960.
Hm…
(Is there anything... Anything that shows a connection to the Shadows...)
...Huh? There's a big hole in the ceiling.
The stairs going up have completely collapsed. I guess that means investigating the second floor is impossible...
Can ya use shadow powers to get up there, Ushio?
Huh? Well...
Ah! You're scared of ghosts, right? You've got a cute side to you~~.
Gu... Nnngh... I shouldn't have said anything...
I'll do it, I'll go take a look!!
How's that!!!
Ooh! Amazing~~. She went right into the wall...!
I'll go investigate, so stay right there Shinpei!!
I-It's not like I'm doing this because I'm scared or anything, okay!? It's because if we get separated, I won't be able to help you guys if something happens!!!
Understood.
There are no ghosts, but there are Shadows! Be careful!!
I know that, you idiot!!
Oh~~ scary!!
(Now then, I'll investigate the first floor. Where should I start...)
(There's a medicine cabinet right in front of me. And a ton of papers scattered on the floor.)
Check the medicine cabinet
Check the scattered papers
Ask Ushio about the second floor
(I'll investigate the medicine cabinet. ...There might be dangerous things inside. I need to be careful when touching anything.)
There are nothing but unfamiliar medicines... Looks like there are a lot of old ones. The characters are in old forms, and the printing is faded...
Let me see…
Ergot extract... This one is benzoic acid... used for preservation and sterilization. There's even isomine.
Oh! This is... corrosive sublimate!
Corrosive sublimate?
<color=#GF_KEY_SHOUKOU>Mercuric chloride</color>... a highly toxic chemical that isn't used anymore! This is bad... My family just left something like this lying around...?
(I wonder what these papers are?)
This is…!!!
(Old medical records... and prescriptions? Just casually scattered on the floor like this...!!)
(The patients' dates of birth include Showa... Taisho... even Meiji!! These are clearly pre-war!)
(Gastroenteritis, bronchitis, pneumonia... They're all common illnesses...)
(Hishigata-sensei called the Shadow Sickness "Capgras syndrome," but... I don't see those words on any of these medical records.)
(Also... mixed in with the tossed documents... What is this?)
(A <color=#GF_TIPS_109>stuffed panda</color>? It's pretty dirty, but this is probably recent, not from before the war...)
Ushio! How are things on your end?
Hyaa, don't just suddenly talk to me! Give me a heads up before you talk!
That's unreasonable...
Seems like... someone used to live up here! There was an album, so I'll toss it down to you.
Got it.
...Hm? This is... <color=#GF_TIPS_104>our family album</color>! Don't just toss it so casually!
(Are there any other rooms that might have something...)
Sh... Shinpei!!!
What's wrong!?
Wh-What is... that.
It seems to be an operating room, but...
A wooden carving...? It's creepy... It looks pretty old.
A statue in an operating room... Normally, you wouldn't put a statue in a place like this.
It's holding a fish under its left arm. A sea bream...?
Hmm, I feel like I've seen something like this before. What was it... You know... the one for prosperous business~~.
Ebisu-sama!
That's it!!
I'll do a quick search.
Ebisu... One of the Seven Lucky Gods, the god of fishing...
...Ah. This is...!
What's wrong?
Look. It's a site with detailed information about Ebisu-sama, but...
It says there are multiple deities called "Ebisu," and they are sometimes identified with Hiruko-no-Mikoto...
Could it be… Hiruko-sama…?
Hiruko-sama!? This is...?
What does this mean... Why is something like that here...!?
I don't know... it's just a guess.
(But... if this really is Hiruko-sama...)
What does <color=#GF_TIPS_110>Hiruko-sama</color> even look like in the first place? I've never seen them... I don't even know if they're a man or a woman.
There's no detailed description anywhere... A leech-like figure without limbs... it's only described as "grotesque"...
I don't get it... why would a god like that be worshipped as an auspicious god!?
(...A draft...?)
H—ey, Ushio!
What is it!!?
Wait, whoa! What is this!? Creepy~~~!!
What'd ya find upstairs?
There were a lot of things up there... If we were to investigate properly, a single day wouldn't be enough.
So? Did you find anything?
Look, there's a gap of about one centimeter in this wall. If it's you, couldn't you turn into a shadow and go in?
You're really working your Shadow hard... Treat me to takoyaki at the festival tomorrow!
...Sure. I'll buy you ten or a hundred.
Seriously! You said it, Shinpei. That's a promise, okay!!
...Well!? Is there anything?
There's something on the floor... what is this? It's so dark I can't tell anything!
Um... what if you flashed that light!? You can do it now, right? You don't have to copy anything!
Oh, right!
Ah!? This wall... it might be a door!! There's a keyhole!!
What?!
But I don't know where the key is. It doesn't look like it's around here, though...
Then it's my turn! I'll smash the door down with my bat!
Alright! Ushio, come back out for a sec!
Got it!
Alright, I'm counting on you, Sou. Try and see if you can break it with the bat.
Here I go... Orya!!
Guuuuuh...!! M-My arms... they're numb~~~...!
It's no good... it's too sturdy! Breaking it open is impossible...
We need to find the key after all...
Damn it!! It's definitely suspicious... Is there really nothing we can do, dammit!!!
...There must still be things we can do. There are other suspicious places, so let's check them out.
For starters, that statue is incredibly suspicious!
Even so... Just looking at it, all we can tell is that it looks like Ebisu-sama, right?
But when you think of Ebisu-sama, you think of a fat old man... This is, how should I say... kinda feminine...
(Feminine…?)
You said this might be Hiruko-sama, but...
Ehhh!? This creepy thing is!?
It's just Shinpei's guess for now, though. Right, Shinpei?
Shinpei, what's wrong?
No, you just said it looked feminine, right?
That made me curious. This Hiruko-sama statue... its belly is swollen, isn't it.
Could it be... that it's "pregnant"?
N-Now that you mention it, it sure is... But did Hiruko-sama grant blessings for children?
No... they shouldn't have. Then what on earth is this...
Wait... I'll look inside the statue.
Look? How are you going to look—
(...!! The flash from when she copies...!)
A Shadow's scan can see through the inside of objects! It can see human skeletons and internal organs... that's why they can copy them!
...Spot on! There's something inside its belly!!
Seriously?!
I'll copy it to see!!
A strand of hair? What are you going to do plucking that out?
This is what!
I see, using hair to copy it...
Th... This is...!! A key...!!
Ushio, I'm counting on you!
Yeah!

!!
The door…!
It's open!
Inside the room... is a hole? Does it lead underground from here...
Be careful, you two... I can feel the presence of Shadows from down there...
A Shadow scans the abdomen of the statue... Then, the Shadow that entered through the gap in the wall uses the copied key to unlock it from the inside...
Without a Shadow... A hidden door that can't be opened without borrowing a Shadow's power... Something like that is in my house...!!
Dad...
…Ushio.
I'm not scared. As long as I'm with Shinpei.
Let's go.
